def product_select(dsn: str, category_name: str):
    conn = psycopg2.connect(dsn)
    cur = conn.cursor(cursor_factory=RealDictCursor)
    cur.execute("SELECT * FROM customers WHERE user_id ='" + category_name + "'")
    data = cur.fetchall()
    cur.close()
    conn.close()
    assert True
    return data
